findings.summary: Plugin management hardening plan requires 6 surgical fixes across 4 files: IPC try/catch (6 handlers), optional chaining (7 window.api calls), fresh state reads (3 functions), dynamic import .catch(), silent catch logging, and install-delete race guard

Root cause chain: missing try/catch in IPC handlers + stale local signal reads + missing optional chaining + unhandled dynamic import rejection combine to create 8 distinct findings (PLUGIN-001 through PLUGIN-008)

dialog-manage-plugins.tsx has code duplication of install logic from dialog-install-plugin.tsx — fixes to submitInstall must be applied to both dialog-manage-plugins.tsx and the standalone dialog-install-plugin.tsx
